overall_recommendation_rationale: Historical data is sufficient in the Cloud DB (eod_prices since 1962, macro_data since 1959, nav_timeseries since 1970; full-series coverage from 2016-09-07), so the blocker is NOT data availability. The blockers are: (1) no historical certified input pack - the builder only reads 3-day P0 fixtures; (2) no metric harness - no code computes turnover, drawdown, volatility, stress or OOS metrics for open_macro_v03. Both are specified for build in lean_harness_spec.md.
task2_gate_effect: Task 2 of the dark launch plan remains BLOCKED; review_closure_record.json must not be created until a non-candidate quantitative_gate_report.json exists with measured values and all five gates go
